name: Shoo-Fly Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Prepare 1 unbaked 9-inch pie shell.
3. Combine corn syrup, molasses and water in a medium-sized mixing bowl; stir in baking soda.
4. Beat a little of the molasses mixture into lightly beaten egg, then stir this back into the mixing bowl.
5. Mix flour, shortening and brown sugar with a pastry blender until it is the texture of coarse crumbs.
6. Mix 1 cup of the crumb mixture into the molasses mixture.
7. Pour into the unbaked pie shell and scatter remaining crumbs on top.
8. Bake in a 400-degree oven for 25 minutes or until crust is lightly browned and filling is puffy.
9. Remove from oven, let cool to room temperature before cutting.
10. Top with whipped cream.
